pythonpro.message:
Heya Mr Roberts!

First of all, i'm glad you figured out how to access this page! Please hear me out before making any decisions

I understand that you might not be allowed to have contact with past students, however if you are able to then here's my email

<a href="mailto:gingacoder@gmail.com

I hope you can keep contact with me, and if not then i'll find a different way

inspectorgoole.message:
Hey Miss Cadman!

To extend what your certificate said, I cannot express how you being my english teacher has made my school experience so much better.

In previous years, I could never successfully enjoy english to the highest degree because I never felt comfortable with the teachers.

I will genuinely miss being taught by you. I'm not kidding!

In response to your card you gave me, yes i'm gonna keep writing stories! I dunno how i'd share them with you, but if you are allowed to then use my email below.

<a href="mailto:gingacoder@gmail.com

I hope we get to talk in the future and if you can't use the email, I hope we meet some time soon :)
